title: HUNTA-845 "Huh? I was a sadist?" "Eh! I was a sadist?" The hidden habit of a cute playhood friend was released! A playhood friend who blames me. A playhood friend who is blamed by me ...
description: The three of us are very close childhood friends who are always playing together at the same school as childhood, elementary school, middle school, and high school. One is a cute girl and the other is a handsome guy who is versatile in sports. The two are dating. It suits you. But actually, I love her too. One day, when I was playing with a psychological test, I suspected that she was M ... A childhood friend who is blindfolded by me and deprived of his freedom. I can only hear that childhood friend's voice, "Stop it!", "Do more!"!
